changes: Death Blossom: Potency increased from 100 to 110; TP cost reduced from 120 to 100.
Katon: Potency increased from 180 to 250.
Doton: Potency increased from 30 to 40.
Venomous Bite: Potency of the venom effect increased from 35 to 40.
Windbite: Potency of the wind damage over time effect increased from 45 to 50.
Blunt Arrow: Potency increased from 50 to 100.
Flaming Arrow: Potency increased from 35 to 40.
Mage's Ballad: Damage reduction on self changed from 15% to 10%; Cast time reduced from 3 to 1.5 seconds.
Army's Paeon: Damage reduction on self changed from 15% to 10%; Cast time reduced from 3 to 1.5 seconds.
Foe Requiem: Cast time reduced from 3 to 1.5 seconds.
Battle Voice: Recast time reduced from 300 to 180 seconds.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency increased from 220 to 230.
Sidewinder: Potency when target is suffering from both Venomous Bite and Windbite increased from 250 to 260.
Wind Blade (Garuda-Egi): Potency increased from 100 to 110.
Burning Strike (Ifrit-Egi): Potency increased from 120 to 135.
Spread: Recast time reduced from 60 to 30 seconds.
Aspected Helios: Damage nullified by the magicked barrier when Nocturnal Sect is active increased from 100% to 120% of HP restored.
Collective Unconscious: Can now be canceled by mechanics that launch the player into the air.
Darkside: The increased damage effect has been increased from 15% to 20%. (PvP only)
Sole Survivor: The marked target will now take an additional 10% damage from attacks. (PvP only)
Shadow Fang: Targets will now receive 20% less HP recovery via healing magic. (PvP only)

jobs_pvp.job: Thaumaturge / Arcanist / Black Mage / Summoner / Conjurer / White Mage / Scholar / Astrologian
changes: Aetheric Burst: Recast time has been reduced from 180 to 120 seconds.
Enhanced Aetheric Burst: Recast time reduction has been changed from 150 to 90 seconds.
